{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "docker-compose.yml",
  "3:LEN": " version: \"3.9\"\r\n \r\n services:\r\n   redis:\r\n     image: redis:7-alpine\r\n     ports:\r\n       - \"6379:6379\"\r\n \r\n   app:\r\n     build: .\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_DB_URL: \"sqlite+aiosqlite:///REDACTED\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL: \"redis://redis:6379/0\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_QUEUE_DEFAULT: \"default\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_CONSUMER_GROUP: \"workers\"\r\n     volumes:\r\n       - REDACTED\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - redis\r\n \r\n   api:\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_SERVICE_NAME: \"api\"\r\n     command: >\r\n       uvicorn miniqueue.api_app:create_app\r\n       --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000\r\n     ports:\r\n       - \"8000:8000\"\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - app\r\n \r\n   worker:\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_SERVICE_NAME: \"worker\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_WORKER_CONCURRENCY: \"4\"\r\n      MINIQUEUE_METRICS_PORT: \"9100\"\r\n     command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"miniqueue.worker\"]\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - app\r\n \r\n   scheduler:\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_SERVICE_NAME: \"scheduler\"\r\n      MINIQUEUE_METRICS_PORT: \"9200\"\r\n     command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"miniqueue.scheduler\"]\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - app\r\n \r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
